_comment_openrouter: OpenRouter's /v1/messages endpoint speaks the Anthropic protocol verbatim (same wire as api.anthropic.com), so this is the plain 'anthropic' provider type pointed at a different base_url — no conversion, tool calls and streaming pass through unchanged. auth_header:"bearer" is required because OpenRouter expects Authorization: Bearer, not x-api-key.
_comment_models: Client-facing model name (the map key) must be the exact OpenRouter model slug, because the anthropic provider forwards the request body verbatim and never rewrites the top-level "model" field. Verify current slugs at openrouter.ai/models before use.
